name: Sausage Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook sausage in a frying pan and drain.
2. In a large bowl, combine the sausage, mozzarella, parmesan, 1 whole egg, and 1 egg white. Mix well.
3. Add parsley, oregano, salt, and pepper to the mixture. Stir until combined.
4. Roll the dough into a circle, similar in size to a medium pizza.
5. Spread the sausage mixture on top of the dough, leaving about 1 inch from the edge.
6. Roll up the dough like a jelly roll. Place it on a cookie sheet.
7. Brush the top lightly with beaten egg yolk.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes until golden brown.
